priority.full_text:
I gave the same task to GPT-5.5 xhigh and Opus 4.7 max.

 – GPT took ~30 minutes.
 – Opus took ~2 hours.

Then I asked them to review each other's work and give an honest verdict on which was better.

 – GPT said its own code was better.
 – Opus said there was no obvious winner.
priority.summary: 开发者对比GPT-5.5和Claude Opus 4.7在代码任务上的性能，GPT-5.5速度快30分钟，但两者对自己的代码评价存在差异。
angles: GPT-5.5 vs Claude Opus实测：速度快4倍，但诚实度有差

2. Le digo a Claude que me lo haga
